prestazioni: Engine swap to a modified **GW4N20** 3.0L twin-turbo V6 (stock in Tank 700) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Manley H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a **Garrett GTX5533R** turbocharger (1.35 A/R turbine housing) and **Precision Turbo 6266** for compound setup, targeting 850whp on E85 with a **Link G4X** standalone ECU and **Injector Dynamics ID1700x** fuel injectors

Full drivetrain reinforcement: **Quaife ATB LSD** for the rear axle, **PPG close-ratio 6-speed manual transmission** (from the Haval H9 GT), **South Bend Clutch Stage 4** twin-disc setup, and **GKN VL3** CV joints with **Polyurethane differential mounts** to handle torque

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins TTX46** coilovers (3-way adjustable), **SuperPro poly bushings** for the multi-link rear and double-wishbone front, **Eibach Pro-Race sway bars** (28mm front, 25mm rear), and **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers** with **380mm two-piece rotors** (from the Ferrari Roma) for braking
estetica: **Rocket Bunny PANDAM V3** widebody kit (custom-fitted for the Tank 800’s chassis) with **carbon fiber fenders**, **extended rocker panels**, and **overfenders** to clear 22x12.5 ET15 **Work Meister S1 3P** wheels wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (325/30R22)

**Seibon Carbon** hood with **functional heat extractor vents** and **custom LED matrix grille** (replacing the stock unit) with **Anzo USA** adaptive headlights (HID projector swap with **Morimoto XB35** bulbs)

**Aeromotions** active rear wing (dual-element, 3D-printed titanium endplates) with **Gurney flaps** and **carbon fiber diffuser** (integrated **Vortex Generators** for downforce optimization), paired with **custom PPF (XPEL Stealth)** full-body wrap in **Matte Military Green** with **gloss black accents**
